era_free_reference.note: shipped era-free models, NOT refit here — same matrices, same seed-42 split

design.leaky_climate: per-year climate joined on (grid_lat, grid_lon, kept-row SURVEY_YEAR)
design.leaky_traffic: kept-row ADT_029 / lane counts / truck share in place of the *_at_entry variants (retired definition)
design.arms: traffic_only (4 columns swapped) and fully_leaky (23 columns swapped)
design.split: seed-42 80/20, identical rows to the shipped matrices

deltas.note: Positive = the leaky build inflates the test C-index. traffic_only swaps the 4 kept-row traffic columns; fully_leaky swaps per-year climate + kept-row reconstruction + kept-row traffic (23 columns). Reported as computed, sign included.
